zh.lifeSummary: 當John Cummings於1565年6月17日出生在英國艾可可普福德時，他的父親John Cummings25歲，母親Elizabeth Neepe23歲。他於1580年與Jane Peals在英國英格蘭艾可可普福德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1634年4月24日在英國素福爾可易普斯維其享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Cummings于1565年6月17日出生在英国艾可可普福德时，他的父亲John Cummings25岁，母亲Elizabeth Neepe23岁。他于1580年与Jane Peals在英国英格兰艾可可普福德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1634年4月24日在英国素福爾可易普斯維其享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cummings
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of Cumming , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Cumings
meanings: English (Middlesex and Surrey): variant of   Cummings  .

variants.name: Comans
meanings: Dutch: variant of Coomans, Coopmans and Koopmans , a genitivized occupational name from koopman ‘merchant’.

variants.name: Commons
meanings: English and Irish (Mayo, Tipperary, and Galway): variant of   Cummings  .
English: variant of Common , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Cummins
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Cummings  .

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

variants.name: Comings
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Cummings  , of Norman origin. This surname is now extinct in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Cummings was born on 17 June 1565, in Copford, Essex, England, his father, John Cummings, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Neepe, was 23. He married Jane Peals in 1580, in Copford, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 24 April 1634, in Ipswich, Suffolk, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Cummings est né le 17 juin 1565, à Copford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Cummings, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Neepe, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Jane Peals en 1580, à Copford, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1634, à Ipswich, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Cummings am 17. Juni 1565 in Copford, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Cummings 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Neepe 23. Er hat 1580 in Copford, Essex, England, United Kingdom Jane Peals geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. April 1634 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Ipswich, Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Cummings è nato il il 17 giugno 1565 nel Copford, Essex, England, il suo padre, John Cummings, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Neepe, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Jane Peals nel 1580, nel Copford, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 24 aprile 1634, nel Ipswich, Suffolk, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Cummingsが1565年6月17日にイギリスエセックスコプフォードで生まれた時，父John Cummingsは25歳，母Elizabeth Neepeは23歳であった。1580年にイギリスイギリスエセックスコプフォードでJane Pealsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1634年4月24日にイギリススフォルクイプスウィチで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Cummings(이)가 1565년 6월 17일 영국 에세스 코p퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Cummings(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Neepe(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1580년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코p퍼드에서 Jane Peals(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1634년 4월 24일 영국 수폴크 이프스위치에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.17 June 1565–24 April 1634: 17 de junho de 1565–24 de abril de 1634
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Cummings nasceu em 17 de junho de 1565, em Copford, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Cummings, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Neepe, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Peals em 1580, em Copford, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1634, em Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Cummings родился 17 июня 1565 г. в местности копфорд, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени John Cummings было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Neepe, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Peals в 1580 г. в местности копфорд, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 24 апреля 1634 г. в местности ипсвич, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.17 June 1565–24 April 1634: 17 de junio de 1565–24 de abril de 1634
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Cummings nació el 17 de junio de 1565, en Copford, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, John Cummings, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Neepe, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Jane Peals en 1580, en Copford, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 24 de abril de 1634, en Ipswich, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
